caption:
OpenAI has expanded its cybersecurity capabilities with the new GPT-5.5-Cyber model, designed to outperform competitors like Anthropic's Mythos on key benchmarks. The updated Codex Security plugin enhances vulnerability detection and patching processes, demonstrating significant advancements in cybersecurity technology. 🔒💻

What impacts will this have on cybersecurity practices?

Sources: The Decoder
